    <title>Mortgage Calculator & Analysis</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg: #f8f9fa;
            --card: #ffffff;
            --text: #1f2937;
            --primary: #2563eb;
            --primary-hover: #1d4ed8;
            --border: #e5e7eb;
            --shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); margin: 0; padding: 2rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; }
        h1 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.5rem; }
        .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .grid { grid-template-columns: 350px 1fr; } }
        
        /* Cards */
        .card { background: var(--card); border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.25rem; box-shadow: var(--shadow); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        
        /* Form */
        .form-group { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
        input[type="range"] { width: 100%; cursor: pointer; }
        .value-display { float: right; font-weight: 400; color: #6b7280; }
        
        /* Stats */
        .stat-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0.75rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .stat-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .highlight { color: var(--primary); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1em; }
        
        /* Tabs */
        .tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .tab { padding: 0.75rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.7; }
        .tab:hover { opacity: 1; background: #f3f4f6; }
        .tab.active { border-bottom-color: var(--primary); opacity: 1; background: #eff6ff; color: var(--primary); }
        .tab-content { display: none; }
        .tab-content.active { display: block; }
        
        /* Comparison Table */
        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse
